measurement_note: Size is C, the number of countries and people; each tier has L = C/2 calls and E = C endpoints. The 32/128/512 tiers span 16x. Half the countries participate in duration-100 calls and half in duration-1 calls, so the expected high-country set is deterministic. The endpoint-expansion join and grouped aggregate process the relations together in O(C log C) portable time. A correct correlated query that rescans Person and Calls for every country completes all tiers but has O(C^2) work and is rejected by scaling rather than a safety cap.

cases.name: benchmark: 32 countries with balanced high and low calls
benchmark: 128 countries with balanced high and low calls
benchmark: 512 countries with balanced high and low calls
